basis: Frontend SSE reconnect audit. It verifies node-level and per-session EventSource streams recover after errors and use backlog sequencing for the active session.

checks.name: store tracks SSE reconnect state
checks.details: session and node streams both have retry delay and timer state

checks.name: reconnect backoff constants are bounded
checks.details: frontend uses a bounded reconnect delay instead of tight retry loops

checks.name: node-level SSE schedules reconnect on error
checks.details: node stream errors must not permanently stop the session list updater

checks.name: node-level reconnect refreshes session list state
checks.details: node stream reconnect refreshes list status before reopening the all-session stream

checks.name: session SSE reconnects with current lastSeq
checks.details: active session reconnect keeps using the latest known sequence for backlog replay

checks.name: session reconnect is gated to the current visible thread
checks.details: stale reconnect timers cannot reopen old sessions after navigation

checks.name: manual subscription closes clear retry timers
checks.details: switching streams clears old retry timers before opening a new EventSource

checks.name: leaving a thread closes the active session stream and retry
checks.details: back/new-chat navigation must stop the per-session stream

checks.name: malformed SSE rows do not kill the stream
checks.details: JSON parse errors are isolated per message
